# Fredericton

> Geotechnical engineering company in United States, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Base Isolation Seismic Design](https://fredericton.geotechnicalengineering.co/base-isolation-seismic-design/)
- [Deep Soil Mixing](https://fredericton.geotechnicalengineering.co/deep-soil-mixing/)
- [Differential Settlement Analysis](https://fredericton.geotechnicalengineering.co/differential-settlement-analysis/)
- [Driven Pile Design](https://fredericton.geotechnicalengineering.co/driven-pile-design/)
- [Field Permeability](https://fredericton.geotechnicalengineering.co/field-permeability/)

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in United States.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
